reviews.review_text: The seller said the car was 'meticulously cared for,' but it turned out the oil change was significantly overdue, which was disappointing.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles

reviews.review_text: The seller did not fully disclose the car's rental history or significant mechanical issues like the transmission shuddering and engine oil consumption.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
Vehicle was used as a rental fleet car for Enterprise for first 38 months of service, higher wear pattern than typical private ownership
Slight oil seep visible at valve cover gasket, consumes approximately 1 quart every 2500 miles

reviews.review_text: The car seems to run well, and the inspections I paid for found no major issues, but there was a minor undisclosed coffee stain on the seat despite claims of it being a very clean example.
revealed_facts: Small coffee stain on rear seat fabric, approximately 2 inches in diameter, mostly hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: The seller did not disclose a significant prior accident, misrepresented the interior condition as 'immaculate,' and downplayed a known engine oil leak.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well

reviews.review_text: The car had minor undisclosed interior wear, and the service records mentioned in the ad were not available for review.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit
